intro: It's lights out and away we go here at the Red Bull Ring for a thrilling race in the iFormula League - HEAT 1! Drivers will be challenging the Grand Prix configuration at 3:00 PM UTC on September 17th. Let's get ready to witness some amazing on-track action!
note: Silas Krag-Vrolijk is off the track in a hurry and there's some car contact! He's already lost several positions!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk makes a daring move - taking p4 off Mackenzie Rune in spectacular fashion!
Darius Rackauskas makes a bold move to snatch p6 away from Kévin Viémont!
Kévin Viémont powers past Darius Rackauskas, taking p6 in an adrenaline-packed move!
Thomas Siros takes p9 from Alexander Schanna with a daring move on lap 2!

Silas Krag-Vrolijk makes a dramatic move to take p4 off Mackenzie Rune, while Kévin Viémont snatches p6 from Darius Rackauskas! Thomas Siros powers past Alexander Schanna and takes p9 with a brilliant overtake.
Thomas Siros takes p9 with an impressive overtake on Alexander Schanna!
Darius Rackauskas makes a daring move and overtakes Kévin Viémont, flying up to p6!
Darius Rackauskas spins and loses multiple positions in a single moment of misfortune.
Darius Rackauskas pulls off an incredible overtake on Rachel Jimenez to grab 7th position!
Thomas Siros makes a valiant effort but is outdone as Alexander Schanna rises to take p9!
Thomas Siros pulls off an audacious move, darting past Alexander Schanna to take p9!
Thomas Siros takes his chances, but Alexander Schanna outguns him and grabs p9!
Darius Rackauskas loses multiple positions in an instant as he goes off the track.
Alex Jönsson swoops past Randolph Smith to grab 12th place!
Darius Rackauskas suffers, spinning off the track in a moment of misfortune and losing multiple positions!
Darius Rackauskas powers past Alex Jönsson, snatching 11th place in an implausible move!
Alex Jönsson overtakes Darius Rackauskas in a daring display of skill, grabbing the eleventh spot!
Darius Rackauskas roars past Alex Jönsson with a stunning overtake, snatching 11th place in an instant!
Darius Rackauskas roars past Alex Jönsson with a stunning move to grab 11th place!
Darius Rackauskas is on fire as he powers past Alex Jönsson for 11th position in a daring overtake!
Darius Rackauskas gets outdone by Alex Jönsson as they battle for 11th place!
Darius Rackauskas makes an incredible overtake on Alex Jönsson, rocketing up to position 11 in a flash!
Darius Rackauskas goes for glory, but Alex Jönsson beats him to it and grabs 11th place.
Darius Rackauskas pulls off an unbelievable move, zooming past Alex Jönsson to snag 11th place!
Darius Rackauskas experiences a major setback as he spins off track, losing multiple positions in an instant!
Darius Rackauskas takes a wild spin off the track, losing multiple positions in a single moment of misfortune! Alexander Schanna zips past Rachel Jimenez to grab an impressive 7th place!
Alex Jönsson swoops past Thomas Siros into 9th place!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk goes absolutely wild, taking p3 with a brilliant overtake on André Selander!
Darius Rackauskas spins off the track and loses multiple positions in a single moment of misfortune, while Alexander Schanna zooms past Rachel Jimenez to grab 7th place!
Alex Jönsson takes a daring overtaking move around Rachel Jimenez to snatch 7th place in an impressive display!
Darius Rackauskas spins off track in a moment of misfortune, losing multiple positions in the blink of an eye! Alexander Schanna also slips and loses several positions.
Silas Krag-Vrolijk drops to fourth as André Selander takes a nail-biting overtake to snatch third position!
Randolph Smith spins off the track, losing control and several positions!
Thomas Siros loses his grip on the race as he spins off, dropping several positions in an instant!
Thomas Siros zooms past Darius Rackauskas, snatching 9th place in an incredible display of skill!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk makes an impressive move, snatching p3 away from André Selander in spectacular fashion!
Alex Jönsson rockets past Kévin Viémont to snatch 6th place in an epic overtake!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk loses control and goes off the track, dropping several positions!
Mackenzie Rune rockets to P3, as André Selander is outdone in an impressive overtake!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk spins off track in a moment of misfortune, while André Selander rockets past Mackenzie Rune with an incredible overtake, claiming third place!
Mackenzie Rune swoops past André Selander with an expert display of driving, taking third position!
André Selander pulls off an epic overtake, snatching third place from Mackenzie Rune!
Mackenzie Rune rockets to third place with a stunning overtake on André Selander in an exciting race at the Red Bull Ring!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk rockets to seventh place with a daring overtake on Rachel Jimenez!
Mackenzie Rune spins off the track, losing control and several positions in a single moment of misfortune!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk charges past Kévin Viémont to take fifth place in a thrilling moment at the Red Bull Ring!
Kévin Viémont goes for glory, charging past Silas Krag-Vrolijk to grab fifth place in an adrenaline-packed move!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk puts on an impressive show, overtaking Kévin Viémont and rocketing up to fifth place in an adrenaline-filled move!
Kévin Viémont rockets past Silas Krag-Vrolijk in a spectacular display of speed, snatching fifth place!
Silas Krag-Vrolijk pulls off an incredible overtake on Kévin Viémont, zooming up to fifth place with an awe-inspiring move!
